huddle: Receive +1 Skill Tier for each ally Agent that is within the range of you Hive or Smart Cover.
throttle_control: Shooting builds stacks to a max of 50. Each stack provides +0.5% Weapon Handling and +4% Critical Hit Damage.
electromagnetic_trigger: Crossbow bolts are equipped with proximity detonators.
aggressive_recon: Getting a Signature Weapon kill gives +15% Signature Weapon Damage for 10s and +25% Reload Speed for the next reload of the weapon (the bonuses do not stack).
red_white_and_blue: Every 2s, enemies you shoot receive a stacking debuff of Red, White and Blue.
full_flag: Anyone dealing damage to an enemy that has all three debuffs will deal 50% damage to other nearby enemies that have at least one of the debuffs.
urban_disruption: 1% Disrupt Resistance. 10% DMG bonus to Disrupted targets.
urban_disruption_backpack: Increase DMG to Disrupted targets from 10% to 25%
symphony: Killing an enemy further than 25m will provide +40% Weapon Damage to Shotguns, SMG's and Pistols, +20% Weapon Damage to AR's and LMG's and 25% Bonus Armor for 15s.
robust: You have {0}% more armor while in cover
steadfast: While in cover, health regeneration kicks in twice as fast
elevated: Increase your damage by {0}% when elevated more than 1.2 meters above your target
providence_talent_well_rounded: Critical Hit Chance bonus for 6 seconds when completing a Cover-to-Cover move.
talent_exotic_smg_MPX: Dealing damage to enemies adds a stack of +{0}% critical hit damage, up to {2} stacks, lasting {1}s.
talent_exotic_rifle_transfusion: Hitting headshots builds stacks, up to a max of 8. When shooting an Ally or Skill, repair them for 50% of the weapon’s Total Damage value for each stack.
talent_exotic_shotgun_cryesix12: Shooting a target applies stacks of venom, which last for 10s. Increasing stacks adds more severe debuffs to the target.
talent_exotic_weapon_the_senate_actum_es: Shooting an enemy with this weapon will give 1 stack.
talent_exotic_pistol_faster_than_reloadi: Having this weapon holstered for 5s reloads and primes it.
talent_exotic_ostracize: Shooting an enemy applies a mark. Only one mark can be active at a time. The mark disappears after 0s, or when the marked enemy dies.
liberator_exotic: Shooting enemies builds stacks to a cap of {0}. Each stack grants {1}% Skill Damage. After {2} seconds, stacks decay {3} per second.
hungry_hog_exotic: Hits apply a debuff dealing 1% weapon damage over 10s. This stacks up to 50 times.
historian_exotic: While holstered, gain +10% headshot damage when scoped with your current weapon.
tenebrae_exotic: Aiming at an enemy marks them as your nemesis for 15s, letting you see them through walls.
cassidy_exotic: Melee attacks instantly kill non-elite enemies.
hildr_exotic: Dealing damage to enemies adds a stack of +{0}% critical hit damage, up to {2} stacks, lasting {1}s.
